top_signals.title: Target Delivers Biggest Sales Gain in Four Years
top_signals.summary: Target posted its best comparable sales growth in four years and boosted its outlook as the retailer’s turnaround bid gains traction. The chain also raised its annual revenue guidance by 2 percentage points to about 4%. Jen Bartashus of Bloomberg Intelligence has more. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
